hero.headline: Discover the Art of Belly Dance
hero.subheadline: Express yourself through the ancient art of belly dance. Join our community of dancers and unlock your inner rhythm.

about.heading: About Me
about.body: Passionate belly dance instructor with over 10 years of experience in Oriental, Tribal Fusion, and Classical Egyptian styles. I believe dance is for everyone — no experience needed, just an open heart and a love for movement.

items.name: Ayşe K.
items.text: This academy transformed the way I move. The structured lessons made it so easy to build confidence in my shimmies and isolations.

items.name: Leila M.
items.text: I never imagined I could learn belly dance online, but the video quality and detailed breakdowns are incredible. I practice every single day!

items.name: Nadia S.
items.text: The choreography course is a masterpiece. I went from feeling lost on stage to performing with real expression and musicality.

items.q: Do I need prior dance experience?
items.a: Not at all! Our Belly Dance Basics course is designed for absolute beginners. We start with posture and simple hip movements before building up to combinations.

items.q: What do I need to get started?
items.a: All you need is comfortable clothing that lets you see your hip movements, a small open space, and a willingness to have fun. A hip scarf is optional but adds to the experience!

items.q: Can I access the courses on mobile?
items.a: Yes! The platform is fully responsive. You can stream lessons on your phone, tablet, or computer — perfect for practicing anywhere.

items.q: How long do I have access to the courses?
items.a: Once you enroll, you get lifetime access to the course material. Rewatch lessons as many times as you like and learn at your own pace.

COURSES.title: Belly Dance Basics
COURSES.description: A beginner-friendly journey into the foundations of belly dance. Learn posture, core hip movements, graceful arm lines, and your very first combination — no experience required.

lessons.title: Introduction to Belly Dance
lessons.content_html:
Welcome to the enchanting world of belly dance! In this opening lesson we explore the rich cultural roots of Raqs Sharqi and set intentions for your practice.

Key takeaways

  • Understand the origins and regional styles of belly dance
  • Learn proper warm-up techniques to protect your joints
  • Set up your practice space for safe, focused training

lessons.title: Basic Stance & Posture
lessons.content_html:
Great belly dance starts with a strong foundation. We'll build your neutral stance — soft knees, engaged core, lifted sternum — so every movement flows from a stable center.

Key takeaways

  • Find your neutral pelvis position for safe hip work
  • Engage the transverse abdominis without holding your breath
  • Maintain a lifted, elegant upper body while relaxing the shoulders

lessons.title: Hip Drops & Lifts
lessons.content_html:
Hip drops and lifts are the bread and butter of belly dance vocabulary. In this lesson you will isolate each hip using the oblique muscles while keeping the upper body perfectly still.

Key takeaways

  • Execute clean single-hip drops on both sides
  • Perform hip lifts with control and musicality
  • Combine drops and lifts into a basic hip pattern

lessons.title: Arm Movements & Framing
lessons.content_html:
Beautiful arms transform good dancing into captivating performance. Learn classic arm positions — serpentine arms, framing gestures, and flowing port de bras adapted for Oriental dance.

Key takeaways

  • Master the snake arms technique with fluid wrist rolls
  • Use arm framing to highlight hip work
  • Coordinate arm pathways with weight shifts

lessons.title: Your First Combination
lessons.content_html:
Time to put it all together! We'll chain hip drops, lifts, and arm movements into an 8-count combination set to a classic baladi rhythm.

Key takeaways

  • Link individual movements into a seamless combination
  • Count and move to the baladi rhythm structure
  • Practice transitioning between moves with grace

COURSES.title: Shimmy & Isolations
COURSES.description: Take your technique to the next level with Egyptian shimmies, chest and shoulder isolations, and the art of layering movements. Perfect for dancers ready to add texture and complexity to their repertoire.

lessons.title: Egyptian Shimmy Fundamentals
lessons.content_html:
The Egyptian shimmy is a rapid, knee-driven vibration that adds dazzling texture to any movement. We'll break it down slowly and build speed over time.

Key takeaways

  • Understand the knee-driven mechanics of the Egyptian shimmy
  • Build shimmy endurance without tensing the upper body
  • Control shimmy speed and intensity to match the music

lessons.title: Hip Shimmy Variations
lessons.content_html:
Beyond the basic shimmy lies a world of variation — three-quarter shimmies, twist shimmies, and glute-driven shimmies each create a distinct visual effect on the hip line.

Key takeaways

  • Differentiate between twist, vibration, and three-quarter shimmies
  • Switch seamlessly between shimmy types mid-phrase
  • Apply each variation to appropriate musical accents

lessons.title: Chest & Shoulder Isolations
lessons.content_html:
Isolating the chest and shoulders independently from the hips opens up a new dimension of expression. We cover chest circles, chest drops, shoulder shimmies, and locks.

Key takeaways

  • Perform chest slides, lifts, and circles in all directions
  • Execute a clean shoulder shimmy at various tempos
  • Isolate the upper body while the lower body maintains a separate pattern

lessons.title: Layering Movements
lessons.content_html:
Layering is the hallmark of an intermediate belly dancer — performing a shimmy on top of a hip circle, or an arm pattern over a traveling step. This lesson teaches you how to split your focus.

Key takeaways

  • Layer a shimmy over hip circles and figure eights
  • Add arm work on top of a lower-body pattern
  • Use layering to create visual complexity and depth

lessons.title: Shimmy Combinations
lessons.content_html:
Bring every shimmy and isolation technique together in a dynamic combination. We'll drill a 16-count phrase that showcases your new skills to a maqsoum beat.

Key takeaways

  • Chain shimmy types into a flowing combination
  • Add chest accents and arm layers for visual richness
  • Perform with confidence and musicality to a maqsoum rhythm

COURSES.title: Choreography Flow
COURSES.description: Learn to build a complete belly dance routine from the ground up. This course covers musicality, transitions, veil work, stage presence, and culminates in a full choreography you can perform with confidence.

lessons.title: Musicality & Rhythm
lessons.content_html:
Great choreography begins with deep listening. In this lesson you will learn to identify common Arabic rhythms — baladi, maqsoum, saidi — and translate their accents into movement.

Key takeaways

  • Recognize doum and tek patterns in popular belly dance rhythms
  • Map musical phrases to movement sequences
  • Use pauses and accents to create dramatic moments

lessons.title: Transitions & Floor Work
lessons.content_html:
Smooth transitions separate a collection of moves from a true dance. We'll work on level changes, traveling steps, and graceful descents to the floor and back.

Key takeaways

  • Transition between standing and floor work safely
  • Use grapevine, chassé, and pivot turns as connectors
  • Maintain audience engagement during level changes

lessons.title: Veil Technique
lessons.content_html:
The veil adds ethereal beauty to any performance. Learn to unfurl, wrap, toss, and butterfly your veil with control and artistry.

Key takeaways

  • Handle a silk veil with confident grip and release
  • Execute wraps, tosses, and butterfly turns
  • Integrate veil work into your choreography seamlessly

lessons.title: Expression & Stage Presence
lessons.content_html:
Technique alone doesn't captivate an audience — expression does. This lesson focuses on facial expression, eye contact, spatial awareness, and the inner confidence that radiates outward.

Key takeaways

  • Project emotion through facial expression and eye contact
  • Use stage space effectively with deliberate pathways
  • Develop a performance persona that feels authentic

lessons.title: Full Choreography
lessons.content_html:
Everything comes together in this capstone lesson. We'll learn a complete three-minute choreography that showcases shimmies, isolations, veil work, floor transitions, and expressive performance.

Key takeaways

  • Perform a polished three-minute belly dance routine
  • Apply musicality, layering, and expression in context
  • Build confidence to perform for an audience
